mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DcChannelMessages (channelId, channelName, timestamp, user, content, contentMd5, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (#{channelId}, #{channelName}, #{timestamp}, #{user}, #{content}, #{contentMd5}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, channelId, channelName, timestamp, user, content, contentMd5, createdAt, updatedAt FROM DcChannelMessages WHERE channelId = #{channelId} ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT DISTINCT channelId FROM DcChannelMessages ORDER BY channelId ASC
